title: PM – Track Renewals & Rail Infrastructure – Contract, Leeds
description_raw: Rullion Engineering are advertising on behalf of a Tier-1 rail contractor for a Project Manager based in Leeds on the TransPennine Route Upgrade (TPU). The successful PM will manage track renewal and civil interface works, including GRIP Stage 6 activities. The contract is outside IR35, starting 14 July 2026, 6-month initial term. PRINCE2 required. Rate circa £700/day. BPSS needed.
